reactions.label: value_modeled
reactions.interest: maintainer plurality and the autonomy of non-state school networks
reactions.public_good_frame: educational freedom includes the freedom to run schools differently
reactions.argument: Transparency in admissions is acceptable; uniform state-imposed admission rules on church schools are not.
reactions.condition_to_change: Rules negotiated with maintainers, honouring existing agreements.

reactions.label: value_modeled
reactions.interest: maintainer plurality and the autonomy of non-state school networks
reactions.public_good_frame: educational freedom includes the freedom to run schools differently
reactions.argument: A state-track phase-down pushes demand to our schools and regulation will follow it; we did not ask to become the escape valve.
reactions.condition_to_change: A negotiated all-maintainer framework agreed before any phase-down starts.

reactions.label: value_modeled
reactions.interest: maintainer plurality and the autonomy of non-state school networks
reactions.public_good_frame: educational freedom includes the freedom to run schools differently
reactions.argument: A uniform structural mandate conflicts with maintainer plurality and with bilateral agreements that have constitutional weight.
reactions.condition_to_change: Constitutional-grade guarantees for maintainer identity within any unified structure.

reactions.label: value_modeled
reactions.interest: maintainer plurality and the autonomy of non-state school networks
reactions.public_good_frame: educational freedom includes the freedom to run schools differently
reactions.argument: Strengthening general schools without structural mandates respects plurality while helping pupils everywhere.
